name: Badr-1
description: Badr-1 was Pakistan's first domestically launched satellite, launched by a Chinese Long March 2E rocket. It was a communications satellite that operated for about 5 months.

name: PAKSAT-1R
description: PAKSAT-1R was a Pakistani communications satellite launched by a Chinese Long March 3B rocket. It replaced the original Paksat-1 and provided C-band and Ku-band services.

name: PRSS-1
description: Pakistan Remote Sensing Satellite-1 (PRSS-1) was Pakistan's first optical remote sensing satellite, launched by a Chinese Long March 2C rocket.
